jsonLd.title: Yatra is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra family as a E-commerce Executive in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra:
Yatra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra!
